'''竏噐-zh-v-k''' ('''kayazhvekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beau|beau]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beau|beau]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-zh-v-k
|-
! Lemma
| kayazhvekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazhvekoko|thiyazhvekoko]] || [[word:jiyazhvekoko|jiyazhvekoko]] || [[word:shiyazhvekoko|shiyazhvekoko]] || [[word:kiyazhvekoko|kiyazhvekoko]]
